roles.name: Head Gamemaker
roles.description: Architect of the arena — designs the over-arching system and oversees its integrity from the Control Room.

roles.name: Arena Coordinator
roles.description: Marshals the tributes of delivery, holds the countdown, and answers to the Head Gamemaker.

roles.name: Capitol Records Keeper
roles.description: Steward of tribute files, sponsor lists, and citizen permission decrees.

roles.name: Forge Apprentice of District 3
roles.description: Builds Apex, LWC, and arena tech in the District 3 workshops.

roles.name: Victor's Village Elder
roles.description: Senior victor who sets the standards and mentors the rising tributes of the Capitol practice.

roles.name: District 4 Trident Master
roles.description: Seasoned career tribute — patrols requirements with practiced craft and a sharp trident.

roles.name: District 7 Axe Hand
roles.description: Carries discovery and configuration through the timber stands under the Trident Master's eye.

roles.name: Beetee's Wire Architect
roles.description: Architect of the great wires between the arena and the world beyond — circuits, currents, and traps.

roles.name: Wire-runner of District 3
roles.description: Strings the cables of API, middleware, and event flows under Beetee's plan.

roles.name: Apprentice Wire-runner
roles.description: Learns the craft of wiring — webhooks, batch jobs, callouts and the District 3 patterns of error handling.

roles.name: Avox Quality Inspector
roles.description: Silent and watchful — finds the flaws in the build before the cameras start rolling.

roles.name: Capitol Stylist-in-Chief
roles.description: Lifts the banner and the brand for product and message — leads all stylist craft and Capitol broadcasts.

roles.name: Sponsor Strategist
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — sounds the call to gather sponsors and convert parachutes.

roles.name: Capitol Prep Team Member
roles.description: Carries the campaign forward into the field — content, creative, and the daily styling ride.

roles.name: Tribute Mentor Scribe
roles.description: Records what is needed and what is promised — translates between the District tribute and the Capitol design council.

roles.name: Senior Forge Master
roles.description: Master craftsman of the Capitol's deep workshops — leads the most complex Apex and LWC builds.

roles.name: Reaping Day Initiate
roles.description: Newly reaped — learning configuration, declarative tooling, and the ways of the platform.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2-3 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

district-12-tributes.name: Reaping Day
district-12-tributes.description: Discovery sign-off — names drawn at the Justice Building.

district-12-tributes.name: Forge the Mockingjay Pin
district-12-tributes.description: Build kickoff: the symbol passed from Madge to Katniss.

district-12-tributes.name: Hob Trade Review
district-12-tributes.description: Mid-project gate: marketplace check-in with Greasy Sae.

district-12-tributes.name: Tessera Reconciliation
district-12-tributes.description: Phase invoice trigger: grain and oil rations reconciled.

district-12-tributes.name: Volunteer As Tribute
district-12-tributes.description: Go-Live: Katniss steps forward for Prim.

district-12-tributes.name: Seam Hand-off
district-12-tributes.description: Hyper-care close: stewardship passed to Gale and the hunters.

capitol-elite.name: Tribute Parade Lights Up
capitol-elite.description: Project kickoff: the chariots ride down the Avenue of the Tributes.

capitol-elite.name: Caesar's Live Interview
capitol-elite.description: Build phase: prime-time broadcast goes live with the new console.

capitol-elite.name: Gamemaker Mid-Games Audit
capitol-elite.description: UAT gate: Plutarch reviews arena feeds end-to-end.

capitol-elite.name: Coronation of the Victor
capitol-elite.description: Go-Live: crown placed in the City Circle ceremony.

capitol-elite.name: Victory Tour Dispatch
capitol-elite.description: Hyper-care close: tour scheduled across the districts.

capitol-elite.name: Snow's Final Invoice
capitol-elite.description: Final invoice: settled at the Snow Mansion.

victors-and-mentors.name: Quell Card Reading
victors-and-mentors.description: Discovery: the envelope is opened and the rules of the Quarter Quell announced.

victors-and-mentors.name: Sponsor Console Online
victors-and-mentors.description: Build: parachute dispatch goes live for the mentors' floor.

victors-and-mentors.name: Haymitch's Strategy Audit
victors-and-mentors.description: Solution review with the bottle in one hand and the playbook in the other.

victors-and-mentors.name: Lightning Tree Activation
victors-and-mentors.description: Go-Live: the wire is fired, the forcefield breaks.

victors-and-mentors.name: Hovercraft Extraction
victors-and-mentors.description: Project close: Plutarch's lift exits the arena.

victors-and-mentors.name: Sponsor Settlement
victors-and-mentors.description: Final invoice from the Victor's Village treasury.

district-13-rebellion.name: Compartment Assignment
district-13-rebellion.description: Kickoff: bunker tattoos applied, schedules synced.

district-13-rebellion.name: First Propo Drops
district-13-rebellion.description: Discovery: Mockingjay propos broadcast across the districts.

district-13-rebellion.name: Squad 451 Deployment
district-13-rebellion.description: Build: Star Squad enters the Capitol with combat cams rolling.

district-13-rebellion.name: Pod Map Acceptance
district-13-rebellion.description: UAT acceptance: the Holo's pod manifest verified end-to-end.

district-13-rebellion.name: Storming the Mansion
district-13-rebellion.description: Go-Live + handoff: the rebellion reaches President Snow's gates.

district-13-rebellion.name: Coin's Settlement
district-13-rebellion.description: Final invoice from Command, signed by President Coin.

Katniss Everdeen.notes: Hunting trip beyond the fence — restocking the Hob.

Peeta Mellark.notes: Bakery inventory day — frosting batch overdue.

Primrose Everdeen.notes: Tending Lady the goat — kid born early.

Gale Hawthorne.notes: Mining shift in Seam — covering for Hazelle.

President Coriolanus Snow.notes: Rose garden tending — annual cultivar pruning.

Effie Trinket.notes: Wig fitting and schedule realignment — punctuality demands it.

Cinna.notes: Couture studio retreat — sketching the girl on fire collection.

Plutarch Heavensbee.notes: Off-grid strategy retreat — clock pocket-watch under repair.

Haymitch Abernathy.notes: Re-supply run — white liquor stock depleted.

Johanna Mason.notes: Avoiding water therapy — recovering in the woods.

Beetee.notes: Wire workshop maintenance — soldering iron recalibration.

Boggs.notes: Holo recalibration drill — squad readiness check.

Cressida.notes: Documentary editing block — propo cut for District 8.
